plugins.name: etak-discovery
plugins.description: Product discovery skills — explore customer needs, map the opportunity space, brainstorm solutions, surface and test assumptions.

skills.name: orient
skills.description: Find your bearings — think out loud, reflect, make sense of half-formed observations.

skills.name: explore
skills.description: See what's in the opportunity space, notice gaps, brainstorm possibilities.

skills.name: sound
skills.description: Probe beneath the surface — surface and examine hidden assumptions.

skills.name: critique
skills.description: Stress-test ideas and opportunities from multiple angles.

skills.name: prioritize
skills.description: Converge — rank options and decide where to focus.

skills.name: experiment
skills.description: Design tests, run them, record results, propagate learning.

agents.name: product-researcher
agents.description: Competitive research, market trends, and opportunity space analysis.
